prose:
Computed property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap of furan (gap = ε_LUMO − ε_HOMO = 6.2573602 eV).

Method provenance
• Property: frontier-orbital energies and gap (eV)
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting)              
• Geometry provenance: single-point on the supplied Cartesian coordinates in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz (no re-optimization; reported as DFT//input-xyz)
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
• Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet; RKS)
• Software: PySCF (via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill)
• Convergence: SCF converged in 9 cycles (scf_converged = true). No warnings reported.

Selected results (eV)
  HOMO-2  −10.332024
  HOMO-1   −7.8707441
  HOMO     −6.3597638
  LUMO     −0.1024036
  LUMO+1    1.4483308
  LUMO+2    1.702378 
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV (Koopmans approximation; not an excitation energy).

Reproducibility
The run was executed with chemkit:
  frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp10d0wq9p/live.json
The engine (PySCF) wrote a live log during execution; see the .out file cited in the run directory for full SCF details and timing.

No warnings were emitted by the engine (warnings: none).
